source.book: 《9分达人雅思听力真题还原及解析6》

segments.text: Course tutor: Oh, Karen.
segments.translation: 哦，凯伦。

segments.text: Course tutor: Hi, come in, take a seat.
segments.translation: 嗨，进来吧，坐。

segments.text: Course tutor: I wanted to talk to you about this assignment you've handed in.
segments.translation: 我想跟你聊聊你交上来的这份作业。

segments.text: Course tutor: I'll give it back to you with detailed feedback, but first there are a few things I'd like to run over.
segments.translation: 我会连同详细的反馈一起还给你，不过先有几点我想跟你过一遍。

segments.text: Course tutor: You know pointers for next time.
segments.translation: 就是给你下次的一些提示。

segments.text: Course tutor: When you hand in your next assignment, can you ensure that you've gone through these aspects?
segments.translation: 你下次交作业的时候，能确保这几个方面都检查过吗？

segments.text: Karen: Hum, sure, will do.
segments.translation: 嗯，好的，我会的。

segments.text: Course tutor: Now, the first thing is your literature review.
segments.translation: 那第一点，是你的文献综述。

segments.text: Course tutor: It was not sufficient enough so I would like to see your book reports to get your complete view.
segments.translation: 写得不够充分，所以我想看看你的读书报告，好完整了解你的想法。

segments.text: Course tutor: So can you submit those with the next assignment?
segments.translation: 所以你能连同下次的作业一起把那些交上来吗？

segments.text: Course tutor: Then I can find out which parts you've chosen to leave out.
segments.translation: 这样我就能看出你选择省略了哪些部分。

segments.text: Karen: Oh, yes.
segments.translation: 哦，好的。

segments.text: Karen: Sorry, I didn't realise you needed them.
segments.translation: 抱歉，我没意识到你需要那些。

segments.text: Karen: It did cross my mind that what I've handed in is a bit thin, but then I started to work on another project and forgot to revise it.
segments.translation: 我当时确实想到过交上去的东西有点单薄，但后来我开始忙另一个项目，就忘了修改了。

segments.text: Course tutor: That's alright.
segments.translation: 没关系。

segments.text: Course tutor: And I've found some errors, just small ones where you had quoted people but not recorded the information properly at the end.
segments.translation: 另外我还发现了一些错误，都是些小问题，就是你引用了别人的话，但最后没有把信息正确地记录下来。

segments.text: Course tutor: Don't forget to go through and make sure that your references are accurate.
segments.translation: 别忘了从头检查一遍，确保你的参考文献是准确的。

segments.text: Course tutor: They were very relevant, though.
segments.translation: 不过它们都很切题。

segments.text: Course tutor: Just check and revise them using the format sample that I've emailed you beforehand, OK?
segments.translation: 只要用我之前邮件发给你的那个格式样本检查修改一下就行，好吗？

segments.text: Karen: Yes, I'll remember to check them.
segments.translation: 好的，我会记得检查的。

segments.text: Course tutor: Now, you made some good points but it might be helpful if you could include a few other examples, just to drive your point home.
segments.translation: 还有，你提出了一些很好的观点，不过如果你能再加几个别的例子来把你的论点说透，可能会更好。

segments.text: Course tutor: Don't start writing more paragraphs; just slot them in at the end of what you've already written.
segments.translation: 别再另起段落写了；直接把它们插到你已经写好的内容后面就行。

segments.text: Course tutor: Now the thing you have to do, if you really want to get a better mark, is expand the ideas you're presenting.
segments.translation: 还有，如果你真想拿个更好的分数，你得做的就是把你阐述的观点展开讲深。

segments.text: Course tutor: Then your argument becomes more valid.
segments.translation: 这样你的论证才更有说服力。

segments.text: Karen: OK.
segments.translation: 好的。

segments.text: Karen: Hum, can I talk to you about this presentation I've got to do?
segments.translation: 嗯，我能跟您聊聊我要做的这个演讲吗？

segments.text: Course tutor: Sure, of course.
segments.translation: 当然可以。

segments.text: Karen: When shall I stage what we've studied?
segments.translation: 我什么时候把我们学的内容展示出来呢？

segments.text: Karen: Am I doing it next term?
segments.translation: 是下学期做吗？

segments.text: Karen: I can't remember what we said.
segments.translation: 我记不清我们当时是怎么说的了。

segments.text: Course tutor: Well, the thing is, Marco couldn't do it, so you agreed to do it at the next seminar.
segments.translation: 这样，情况是马可做不了，所以你答应了在下次研讨会上做。

segments.text: Course tutor: So how can I help?
segments.translation: 那我能帮你什么呢？

segments.text: Karen: Um … actually, I'm wondering what you suggest to be the key part of the presentation.
segments.translation: 嗯……其实，我想知道您建议把哪部分作为演讲的重点。

segments.text: Karen: I mean, which part should I spend most of my time on?
segments.translation: 我是说，我应该在哪部分上花最多的时间？

segments.text: Course tutor: That's a question to the point.
segments.translation: 这个问题问到点子上了。

segments.text: Course tutor: Well, you have very little time really, so it's absolutely essential for you to explain the experiment.
segments.translation: 嗯，你的时间其实非常有限，所以你把实验讲清楚是绝对关键的。

segments.text: Course tutor: Of course, you'll have a summary in the handouts you give out but you can still start the presentation with that.
segments.translation: 当然，你发的讲义里会有个摘要，不过你还是可以用它来开场。

segments.text: Course tutor: It's optional, though.
segments.translation: 不过那是可选的。

segments.text: Karen: And do I have to give you the abstract first, or shall I just email it to all the students?
segments.translation: 那我要先把摘要给您呢，还是直接邮件发给所有学生？

segments.text: Course tutor: Uh, no.
segments.translation: 呃，不用。

segments.text: Course tutor: I do need to see it first and see if it needs to be polished up.
segments.translation: 我确实得先看看，看看它需不需要润色一下。

segments.text: Course tutor: And then we'll get some printouts done.
segments.translation: 然后我们再把它打印出来。

segments.text: Course tutor: Now, they'll need to be done by 3rd December, so I'll need to see it by 26th November if that's OK?
segments.translation: 这些得在12月3日之前弄好，所以如果可以的话，我需要在11月26日之前看到它？

segments.text: Karen: Yes, fine.
segments.translation: 行，没问题。

segments.text: Course tutor: Oh, and I need to talk to you about where the presentation is going to be made.
segments.translation: 哦，我还得跟你说说演讲要在哪里做。

segments.text: Course tutor: Given the actual number of participants and audience, we've had problems with the rooms because we'll need something bigger than usual.
segments.translation: 考虑到实际的参与人数和听众，我们在场地上遇到了些麻烦，因为我们需要一个比平常更大的地方。

segments.text: Course tutor: In our faculty, the only room available is the computer room, which is far from suitable considering the layout of the room, so we'll have to go across the road and do it in the chemistry lab.
segments.translation: 在我们院里，唯一空着的房间是机房，但考虑到房间的布局那儿很不合适，所以我们只能过马路，去化学实验室做。

segments.text: Course tutor: It's big enough to accommodate everyone and is equipped with the proper overhead projector in there as well.
segments.translation: 那儿够大，能容下所有人，而且里面也配有合适的投影仪。

segments.text: Karen: OK, right.
segments.translation: 好的，行。

segments.text: Karen: And I get a grade for this, don't I?
segments.translation: 这个我会得到一个成绩，对吧？

segments.text: Course tutor: Yes, your first one was graded by your tutor, but this one will be scored by the professor.
segments.translation: 对，你的第一次是由你的导师评分的，但这次会由教授来打分。

segments.text: Course tutor: But relax, the criteria will be consistent, and you'll get an unbiased result.
segments.translation: 不过别紧张，评分标准是一致的，你会得到一个公正的结果。

segments.text: Karen: Oh, and I've sorted out my modules for next year.
segments.translation: 哦，我还把明年的课程模块选好了。

segments.text: Karen: You asked me to tell you about my choices.
segments.translation: 您之前让我跟您说说我的选择。

segments.text: Course tutor: Yes, what've you decided?
segments.translation: 是的，你决定选什么了？

segments.text: Karen: Oh, it was really hard to determine.
segments.translation: 哦，真的挺难决定的。

segments.text: Karen: Hum, I've already done the Data Collection once, so that wasn't really a choice.
segments.translation: 嗯，数据收集我已经修过一次了，所以那个其实没得选。

segments.text: Karen: I couldn't make up my mind between Language and Society and Communication Skills.
segments.translation: 我在《语言与社会》和《沟通技巧》之间拿不定主意。

segments.text: Karen: I read the syllabuses but they sound more or less the same to me.
segments.translation: 我看了教学大纲，但在我看来它们内容差不多。

segments.text: Karen: Anyway, I went for Communication Skills in the end because I know the lecturer.
segments.translation: 反正，我最后选了《沟通技巧》，因为我认识那个讲师。

segments.text: Karen: Actually, Social Interaction seems to cover much the same ground, so I didn't bother with that either.
segments.translation: 其实呢，《社会互动》看起来涵盖的内容也大致相同，所以那个我也没选。

segments.text: Karen: Hum, I thought Discourse Analysis looked really interesting.
segments.translation: 嗯，我觉得《话语分析》看起来真的很有意思。

segments.text: Karen: It studies and analyses the texts beyond the literal meaning of the sentences.
segments.translation: 它研究和分析超出句子字面意思的文本。

segments.text: Karen: It looks into the connotation beyond the sentences.
segments.translation: 它探究句子背后的深层含义。

segments.text: Karen: And in fact, it also covers a little bit of Research Methodology in it, so I thought I'd do that, rather than the full methodology course.
segments.translation: 而且实际上，它里面还涉及一点《研究方法论》的内容，所以我想选它，而不选完整的方法论课程。

segments.text: Karen: Kill two birds with one stone as it were.
segments.translation: 算是一举两得吧。

segments.text: Karen: And then I fancied something drastically different, so I thought Psycholinguistics would be interesting, unless you think it'll be more worthwhile for me to do the Phonology course?
segments.translation: 然后我想来点截然不同的，所以我觉得《心理语言学》会挺有意思，除非您觉得我修《音系学》这门课更值得？

segments.text: Course tutor: No, I think you've made sensible choices.
segments.translation: 不，我觉得你的选择很明智。

segments.text: Course tutor: I'm glad you're organised.
segments.translation: 我很高兴你这么有条理。

segments.text: Course tutor: OK, let's meet again in a couple of weeks to see how you're getting on.
segments.translation: 好，我们过几周再见一次，看看你的进展怎么样。

segments.text: Karen: OK, thank you.
segments.translation: 好的，谢谢您。

segments.text: Karen: See you then.
segments.translation: 那到时候见。
